variables.name: purpose
variables.description: What the reader needs to do with it

title: Write a Proposal
description: Make a persuasive, well-structured case for an idea.
content:
Help me write a proposal for: {{idea}}

Structure: the problem and why it matters now, the proposed solution, the expected benefit (quantified if possible), the cost and risks (stated honestly), and the alternatives considered. Lead with the reader's interest, not mine. Pre-empt the strongest objection. Keep it tight enough that a busy decision-maker reads the whole thing.

title: Give Constructive Feedback
description: Phrase critique so it's heard and actionable.
content:
Help me give feedback on: {{situation}}

Draft feedback that is specific, kind, and actionable. Anchor it to observable behavior and impact, not character. Lead with the most important point. Make the path forward concrete. Avoid the feedback sandwich and vague praise. Keep my respect for the person evident throughout. Show the message and explain the one phrasing choice that matters most.

title: Rewrite to Remove Jargon
description: Make specialist text accessible without dumbing it down.
